title: Ma and Pa Kettle
writer: Herb Margolis, Lou Morheim, Al Lewis
actors: Marjorie Main, Percy Kilbride, Richard Long
plot: On the verge of being evicted from their run-down farmhouse, the large Kettle family is given a new, modern home after Pa wins a contest, but he is accused of plagiarizing his winning slogan by a jealous local woman.
